recommendations.title: Another Round
recommendations.overview: Four stagnant high school teachers decide to test out a theory that maintaining a constant level of intoxication will improve their overall lives.

recommendations.title: The Hunt
recommendations.overview: A teacher lives a lonely life, all the while struggling over his son’s custody. His life slowly gets better as he finds love and receives good news from his son, but his new luck is about to be brutally shattered by an innocent little lie.

recommendations.title: The Celebration
recommendations.overview: The family of a wealthy businessman gather to celebrate his 60th birthday. During the course of the party, his eldest son presents a speech that reveals a devastating secret that turns the night into a battle of truth and denial.

recommendations.title: Far from the Madding Crowd

recommendations.title: Kursk
recommendations.overview: Barents Sea, August 12th, 2000. During a Russian naval exercise, and after suffering a serious accident, the K-141 Kursk submarine sinks with 118 crew members on board. While the few sailors who are still alive barely manage to survive, their familie

recommendations.title: The Commune

recommendations.title: It's All About Love

recommendations.title: Submarino
recommendations.overview: As children, Nick and his little brother take care of their baby brother while their mother drinks herself senseless. But the baby dies, and both brothers blame themselves. Many years later, Nick is out of prison after serving time for an assault. He

recommendations.title: The Death of Dick Long
recommendations.overview: Dick died last night, and Zeke and Earl don’t want anybody finding out how. That’s too bad though, cause news travels fast in small-town Alabama.

recommendations.title: The Big Kahuna
